zh-cn.consumable_10pulls_ticket_tooltip: 该道具暂无任何实际用途
zh-cn.currency_pyroxene_tooltip:
虽然可以用来抽卡，但由于该功能还未实装，因此没有什么意义
（暂时也没有做抽卡功能的想法）
zh-cn.consumable_emergency_ration_tooltip:
虽然味道难以恭维，但至少能保存很久，不用担心会过期
不可被生产，不能提供进餐指令
zh-cn.campaign_starfarers_guide_content:
在此剧本中，玩家扮演的‘老师’作为阵营“%%factionName_Utnapishtim%%”的管理者，需要确保所有学生的身心维持健康。

在此剧本中开放的功能：
- %%helper_management_guide%%
- %%helper_sandbox_guide%%
- %%helper_relationships_guide%%
- %%helper_combat_guide%%

DEMO简介：
由于大部分精力都用在做系统，导致上述机制虽然存在但是缺乏引导（因为还没开始做）
我自认在机制和UI上都简化了许多，但若还是不够（解释不清楚/机制不够直觉/UI反常识）还请各位指出，毕竟一个人DEBUG是有极限的。
之后的页面将会简单介绍一下各项机制，和如何测试这些机制
zh-cn.helper_combat_guide_content:
回合制战斗。每回合每个角色有2个（或更多）动作。所有人选择动作后按照动作的%%combat_stat_speed%%来排先后，并且按照该顺序执行。
玩家可以提前预测到部分动作的结果（例如攻击是否能够命中，但无法知道能否击穿护甲），并且更改玩家侧的行动安排来取得优势。
因为我不喜欢数值膨胀，所以全员的HP都很低，但采纳了类似只狼的%%combat_stat_posture%%系统（%%combat_stat_posture%%作为临时HP会吸收大部分，被打空后丢失下一个动作，且%%combat_stat_posture%%恢复前HP会受到全额伤害）

战斗内数值对抗的话，目前有
- %%combat_stat_tracking%%vs%%combat_stat_evasion%%
- 距离vs%%combat_stat_range%%
- 武器伤害和伤害类型vs防御护甲

如何测试？

移动到【%%campaign1_map_utnapishtim_medical%%】的【%%medbay_dojo_arena%%】然后点击【%%com_furniture_combat_sim_displayName_1%%】，会开始一场玩家和随行NPC们一队 对抗随机生成的AI的战斗。
玩家单人战斗的话，必须将玩家的阵容分配设为前排。
回合制战斗，最多10轮，战斗结束后全员会回满HP（毕竟是模拟战斗）
战斗内的UI……看起来会很乱七八糟。我尽力了，如果还是看不明白或者觉得系统太复杂，还请多多反馈。

如果不喜欢战斗的话，可以开启【DEBUG】模式，战斗界面会有一键结束战斗的选项
zh-cn.helper_management_guide_content:
主要玩法为，通过管理NPC们的日程和作息，确保有足够的食物和金钱，以此满足NPC们的需求。
NPC们有两大需求：食物（会每日从阵营道具栏扣除食物）和睡眠（需要每位NPC每天都有安排睡眠时间，见%%helper_sandbox_guide%%）。

食物的获取途径：通过【远征】获取，通过【%%ui_management_production_Trade_TITLE%%】购入，或购入食材后通过【%%ui_management_production_PO_TITLE%%】来加工制造而成

【%%ui_management_tab_jobs%%】页，选定了NPC后【%%ui_management_jobs_edit%%】允许玩家给NPC安排工作日程表（见%%helper_sandbox_guide%%）

【%%ui_management_tab_production%%】页允许玩家设立制造/贸易订单
存在可制造的订单时，安排了对应工作的NPC会前去工作。存在贸易订单时，每日结束时会结算所有进出口

【%%ui_management_tab_overview%%】页的【%%ui_management_connectedFactions_edit%%】允许玩家与外界势力建立联系。建立联系后，开放与对应阵营的贸易订单，开放对应阵营的外派工作。

【%%ui_management_tab_expeditions%%】页可以创建队伍，自由分配学生，然后外派探索并遭遇各种事件。
分配了【远征】的学生会在预定的出发时间离开据点，直到探索结束才会回来。途中需要过夜的话，会留在外过夜
如果探索结束时没有遭遇需要玩家手动结算的事件（例如战斗）那么队伍会自动归来，否则会在营地等到玩家手动处理完了事件才会回来

如何测试？

点击【%%comManager_bottom_management%%】按钮打开管理界面即可。
【%%ui_management_connectedFactions_edit%%】页内添加【%%factionName_jp_convenience_store_SunMart%%】后，【%%ui_management_tab_production%%】页内可以用日元购买食物，【%%ui_management_tab_jobs%%】页中可以派学生外出打工赚日元，【%%comManager_bottom_map%%】界面中也可以直接前往去便利店。
【%%comManager_bottom_map%%】到【%%campaign1_map_utnapishtim_faming%%】的【%%hydroponics_hydroponics%%】可以种植物。被指派了【%%com_job_farm_maintain_displayName_1%%】的NPC会负责每日的浇水工作（但目前收获了也因为还没做对应食谱所以没什么意义）
zh-cn.helper_relationships_guide_content:
NPC的状态被分为：%%chara_status_mood%%和%%chara_status_stress%%。

NPC的过往记忆会影响%%chara_status_mood%%和%%chara_status_stress%%（例如娱乐行为成功会改善心情，工作会增加压力）。
关于记忆条目，请见【%%helper_sandbox_guide%%】

NPC与人的关系属性分为：好感、厌恶、信任、恐惧。正面的互动结果增加好感，负面的增加厌恶。一起工作增加信任，要求执行NPC不想做的会增加恐惧。
关系的基础数值为累加制，而当前数值则会受到角色的当前心情和压力影响。

NPC对玩家的最终态度决定NPC对玩家指令的接受度。而该态度的计算基于上述的【人际关系的当前数值】。

除了角色态度外，其他会影响指令接受率的要素：
- 双方的关系是否允许当前指令
- 双方最近的互动结果，和是否连续拒绝与对象互动

总的来说，与NPC互动成功会提高后续指令成功率，而互动失败会降低后续成功率。连续互动失败只会越来越糟。
遇到这种情况，请等NPC自己休息一会调整下心情，或者等NPC做了点别的事情将之前的糟糕体验忘掉后，再次互动吧！
zh-cn.helper_sandbox_guide_content:
NPC会做的事情（按照优先级顺序）
- 安排了远征的话，会离开据点出发远征
- 有安排工作，且该工作能够执行（例如制造订单有需要的原材料时）就会寻找工作地点然后去工作
- 到了该睡觉的时点就会去自己的房间睡觉（默认22点，但可能会由于工作安排而调整，请在每位NPC的日程安排界面确认时间点）
- 到了饭点（ 6 12 18点）且阵营道具栏内有【非应急食品的其他食物】时，会去食堂吃饭
- 上述都没有的话，会寻找休闲项目（玩游戏，看电视等）

NPC的每日经历都会记录在【%%comManager_bottom_inspect%%】的【%%charaDetail_btn_relationship%%】界面内。
角色的心情和压力会受到最近的几项记忆影响。不重要的日常作息记忆会在一定时间后删除。

玩家也是只有在22点后才可以睡觉。
需要快速度过时间的话，可以在【%%ui_main_comtab_title_title2%%】处启动【DEBUG】就可以随时睡觉了。

NPC错过吃饭也不会有任何惩罚。

NPC如果需要睡觉，且持续24小时没睡觉的话，会获得debuff。
NPC会根据自己的工作时程，在没有工作安排的自由时间中安排睡眠时间。
NPC会尽量将睡眠时间调整到与家庭阵营的统一睡眠时间一致（默认22点）。
zh-cn.helper_JSON_guide_content:
大部分游戏内的信息（角色/地图/道具/阵营/装备/指令/事件/地文口上等等）全都是在游戏启动时读取外部JSON配置文件后生成的。

位置在（游戏根目录）/Data 内。
包含所有JSON文档，和PNG/SPINE图片素材（图像素材也是读取散装文件的，缺点是稍微慢一点，优点是可以自己随便加，然后JSON改一改图片路径）

en-us.helper_combat_guide_content:
Turn-based combat system. Each character has 2 (or more) actions per turn. After everyone selects their actions, actions are executed in action's %%combat_stat_speed%% order.
Players can partially predict action outcomes (e.g., player can know whether an attack will hit, but cannot know whether the attack will penetrate armor), and player should adjust their own action during planning for more advantages.
To avoid number inflation, everyone's HP are being kept at a low value, and a %%combat_stat_posture%% system similar to Sekiro has been implemented (%%combat_stat_posture%% acts as temporary HP absorbing most damage; once depleted, the character will lose its next action, and will take full HP damage until %%combat_stat_posture%% recovers).

As for numerical values comparisons in combat, there are:
- %%combat_stat_tracking%% vs %%combat_stat_evasion%%
- Distance vs %%combat_stat_range%%
- Weapon Damage and Damage Type vs Defense Armor

How to test?

Go to [%%medbay_dojo_arena%%] at [%%campaign1_map_utnapishtim_medical%%] and click [%%com_furniture_combat_sim_displayName_1%%] to start a mock battle between the player's team (with all accompanying NPCs) and randomly generated AI.
If the player fights alone, player character must be set to the frontlines.
A combat lasts maximum 10 rounds. All character's HP are fully restored after combat ends (since it's a simulation).
The combat UI... might look a bit messy. I tried my best. If it's still confusing or the system feels too complex, please provide feedback.

If you don't like combat, you can enable [DEBUG] mode, and there will be an option to instantly end the battle in the combat UI.
en-us.helper_JSON_guide_content:
Most in-game information (Characters/Maps/Items/Factions/Equipment/Commands/Events/Descriptions, etc.) are generated by reading external JSON configuration files at game startup.

Location: (Game Root Directory)/Data.
Contains all JSON documents and PNG/SPINE image assets (image assets are also loaded from loose files; downside is it's slightly slower, but the upside is you can add whatever you want without needing to package assets via Unity).
en-us.helper_management_guide_content:
The main gameplay involves managing NPCs' schedules and routines to ensure acquisition of food and money.
NPCs have two major needs: Food (food items are deducted daily from faction inventory) and Sleep (satisfied by scheduling sleep time for each NPC every day, see %%helper_sandbox_guide%%).

Ways to obtain food: Through [Expedition], purchasing via [%%ui_management_production_Trade_TITLE%%], or purchasing ingredients and processing them via [%%ui_management_production_PO_TITLE%%].

In the [%%ui_management_tab_jobs%%] tab, after selecting an NPC, [%%ui_management_jobs_edit%%] allows the player to set work schedule for the NPC (see %%helper_sandbox_guide%%).

[%%ui_management_tab_production%%] tab allows players to set up crafting or trade orders.
Crafting orders requires assigning NPC to specific job commands (and will be completed when NPC go to work). Trade orders are fulfilled at the end of each day.

[%%ui_management_connectedFactions_edit%%] in the [%%ui_management_tab_overview%%] tab allows players to establish relationship with outside factions. Once established, trade orders and external work assignments for that faction become available.

The [%%ui_management_tab_expeditions%%] tab allows creating expedition teams (team members can be freely assigned), and sending them out to explore and encounter various events.
Students assigned to [Expedition] will leave the base at the scheduled departure time and return after exploration ends. If they need to stay overnight, they will stay outside.
By the end of exploration, if there are no events requiring player intervention (e.g., combat), the team will return automatically; otherwise, they will wait at the camp until the player manually handles all events.

How to test?

Click the [%%comManager_bottom_management%%] button to open the management interface.
After adding [%%factionName_jp_convenience_store_SunMart%%] in the [%%ui_management_connectedFactions_edit%%] page, you can buy food with JPY in the [%%ui_management_tab_production%%] page, send students out for part-time jobs to earn JPY in the [%%ui_management_tab_jobs%%] page, or go directly to the convenience store via [%%comManager_bottom_map%%].
Go to [%%hydroponics_hydroponics%%] at [%%campaign1_map_utnapishtim_faming%%] to plant crops. NPCs assigned to [%%com_job_farm_maintain_displayName_1%%] will be responsible for daily watering (though harvesting currently doesn't mean much as corresponding recipes haven't been made yet).
en-us.helper_relationships_guide_content:
NPC states are divided into: %%chara_status_mood%% and %%chara_status_stress%%.

NPCs' past memories affect %%chara_status_mood%% and %%chara_status_stress%% (e.g., successful recreation improves %%chara_status_mood%%, work increases %%chara_status_stress%%).
For memory entries, please see [%%helper_sandbox_guide%%].

NPC's relationships scores are divided into: Affection, Disgust, Trust, and Fear. Positive interactions increase Affection, negative ones increase Disgust. Working together increases Trust, and forcing NPCs increases Fear.
The base relationship scores are cumulative, while current values are affected by the character's current mood and stress.

The NPC's final attitude towards the player determines their acceptance of player commands. This attitude calculation is based on the aforementioned [Current Relationship Values].

Besides character attitude, other factors affecting command acceptance are:
- Whether their relationship allows the current command
- Results of all recent interactions between both parties, and whether there have been repeated refusals in these interactions

In summary, successful interaction with an NPC makes subsequent commands easier, while failed interaction makes is harder. Continuous failures will only make things worse.
In such cases, please wait for the NPC to rest / adjust their mood / do something else and forget about the previous bad experience before trying to interact again!
en-us.helper_sandbox_guide_content:
Things NPCs will do (in order of priority):
- If an expedition is scheduled for them, they will leave the base for the expedition.
- If work is scheduled and can be executed (e.g., there are enough raw materials needed for crafting orders), they will find valid work location and go work there.
- When it's time to sleep, they will go to their room to sleep (default 22:00, but may be adjusted depending on their assigned work hours. Please check each NPC's sleep schedule in their personal schedule).
- At meal hours (6, 12, 18 o'clock), if there is [Food other than emergency rations] in the faction inventory, they will go to the cafeteria to eat.
- If none of the above, they will look for recreational activities (playing games, watching TV, etc.).

NPCs' daily experiences are recorded in the [%%charaDetail_btn_relationship%%] interface at [%%comManager_bottom_inspect%%].
Character mood and stress are affected by recent memories. Unimportant daily routine memories will be deleted after a certain time.

Players can also only sleep after 22:00.
If you need to pass time quickly, you can enable [DEBUG] at [%%ui_main_comtab_title_title2%%] to sleep at any time.

There is no penalty for NPCs missing meals.

If a NPC needs sleep and hasn't slept for 24 continuous hours, they will get a debuff.
NPCs will schedule sleep hours in their free time (time when they dont have work).
NPCs will try to match their sleep time with home faction's default sleep time (which is 22:00).
en-us.consumable_10pulls_ticket_tooltip: This item currently has no practical use.
en-us.currency_pyroxene_tooltip:
Although it can be used to pull, this item is useless because this functionality has not yet been implemented.
(There are currently no plans to implement any gacha function)
en-us.consumable_emergency_ration_tooltip:
Although the taste is unpalatable, it can be stored for a long time without expiring.
Count as meal item for the purpose of daily need, but cannot be manufactured, and cannot provide 'get meal' command
en-us.campaign_starfarers_guide_content:
In this scenario, player takes the role of 'Sensei', the manager of the faction '%%factionName_Utnapishtim%%', who is responsible for ensuring the physical and mental well-being of all students.

Features available in this scenario:
- %%helper_management_guide%%
- %%helper_sandbox_guide%%
- %%helper_relationships_guide%%
- %%helper_combat_guide%%

DEMO Introduction:
Since most dev time are spent on developing game systems, these aforementioned gameplay systems exist but lack guidance (as it hasn't been implemented yet).
I tried my best to simplify mechanics and optimize UI, but if it is still insufficient (such as unclear explanations / unintuitive mechanics / counter-intuitive UI), please point them out, as there are limits to debugging alone.
The following pages will briefly introduce various mechanics and how to experience / test them.
